statement: In every magma, Equation 2603 (`x = (y * ((z * z) * x)) * z`) implies Equation 1845 (`x = (x * (x * y)) * (z * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0773
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z z) x)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op x (op x y)) (op z z))
